prestazioni: Engine swap to a Jaguar XK6 4.2L inline-6 (engine code: XK6 4.2) with a bespoke dry-sump oiling system from Aviaid, paired with a custom billet crankshaft from Bryant Racing and forged Mahle pistons (9.5:1 compression ratio) for high-RPM reliability up to 7,500 RPM

Custom forced induction via a Rotrex C38-91 centrifugal supercharger (12 psi boost) with an intercooler setup from Bell Intercoolers, utilizing a custom intake manifold fabricated by Vintage Air and a custom fuel system with Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pumps and ID1000 injectors

Full engine management conversion to a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with a custom wiring harness by Painless Performance, integrated with a custom traction control system and launch control, paired with a Tilton triple-plate clutch and a Quaife ATB differential (3.54:1 final drive ratio)
estetica: Full custom widebody conversion using hand-formed aluminum panels by RML Group, extending the fenders by 3 inches to accommodate 18x9.5 and 18x11 BBS RS-GT wheels (ET20 and ET35 offsets) with 225/40 and 265/35 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires

Custom front splitter and rear diffuser by KW Automotive, fabricated from carbon fiber and designed for downforce optimization at high speeds, paired with a custom rear spoiler by D2 Racing (adjustable angle up to 15 degrees)

Full interior reupholstery in bespoke Bridge of Weir leather with Alcantara headliner, custom Recaro CS sport seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses, and a custom roll cage by Safety Devices (FIA-spec, bolt-in design with integrated harness bars)
